scenarios.scenario-1: User can copy tg://proxy link directly from the verify page.
scenarios.scenario-2: Manual MTProto mode shows server, port, secret, and clear insertion guidance.
scenarios.scenario-3: Error pages remain readable and do not expose internals.
scenarios.scenario-4: Cyrillic instructions, buttons, and failure text never degrade into mojibake.

critical-invariants.invariant-1: Success and error instructions remain human-readable UTF-8 text on the rendered page.

evidence.item: `validate_verify_ux.sh` is the current deterministic check for rendered copy affordances and setup guidance.

production-gates.gate-1: Manual MTProto guidance and copy labels never degrade into mojibake.
production-gates.gate-2: Compiled runtime probe for verify-page copy stays green after every release-affecting change.
